tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: AB de Villiers is one of the most innovative batsmen in cricket history and was known as Mr. 360 for his ability to play shots all around the field.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He once held the record for the fastest ODI century scored in just 31 balls.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: AB de Villiers played for South Africa across all formats and was famous for his versatility and creativity.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Jacques Kallis is considered one of the greatest all rounders in cricket history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He scored more than 10,000 Test runs and also took more than 250 Test wickets.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Kallis played a key role in South Africa's dominance during the early 2000s.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Dale Steyn is widely regarded as one of the fastest and most lethal bowlers in modern cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He became the leading wicket taker for South Africa in Test cricket.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Steyn was known for his pace, aggression and ability to swing the ball.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Faf du Plessis is a former South African captain known for his consistency and leadership.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He captained South Africa across multiple formats and scored many important centuries.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Faf du Plessis is also known for his outstanding fielding skills.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Quinton de Kock is an explosive opening batsman and wicketkeeper for South Africa.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has scored multiple centuries in international cricket across formats.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: De Kock became one of the youngest South African captains in limited overs cricket.
